name: POM-112
name_cat: Posició de butxaca des del cinturó
description_en: Measure from the top edge of the waistband to the top edge of the side pocket opening.
description_cat: Mesura des de la vora superior del cinturó fins a la vora superior de lobertura de la butxaca.

name: POM-111
description_en: Measure from HPS straight down to the top edge of the logo or print.
description_cat: Mesura des de HPS fins a la vora superior del logo o estampat, centre davanter.

name: POM-110
description_en: Measure from center front neck seam to the nearest edge of the main label.
description_cat: Mesura des de la costura del coll al centre davanter fins a la vora més propera de letiqueta.

name: POM-103
description_en: Measure from HPS to the top edge of the chest pocket, along the center front.
description_cat: Mesura des de HPS fins a la vora superior de la butxaca de pit, centre davanter.

name: POM-102
name_cat: Posició de la talla de coll
description_en: Measure from HPS to the gorge point where collar meets lapel.
description_cat: Mesura des de HPS fins al punt dunió de coll i solapa.

name: POM-101
description_en: Measure the width of the lapel at its widest point, perpendicular to the lapel roll line.
description_cat: Mesura lamplada de la solapa al seu punt més ample.

name: POM-100
description_en: Measure from HPS straight down the center front to the bottom hem of the jacket.
description_cat: Mesura des de HPS fins al baix de la xaqueta, centre davanter, peça plana.

name: POM-099
description_en: Measure the width of the elastic waistband channel from side seam to side seam, fully relaxed.
description_cat: Mesura del canal elàstic de cintura de costura a costura, completament relaxada.

name: POM-098
description_en: Measure the horizontal width of the pocket opening or welt, edge to edge.
description_cat: Mesura lamplada horitzontal de lobertura o viu de la butxaca.

name: POM-097
description_en: Measure the length of the side pocket opening from top to bottom.
description_cat: Mesura la longitud de lobertura de la butxaca lateral de dalt a baix.

name: POM-096
description_en: Measure the maximum width of the hood at its widest point, hood open.
description_cat: Mesura lamplada màxima de la caputxa al punt més ample. Caputxa oberta.

name: POM-095
description_en: Measure from the crown of the hood to the bottom seam joining the hood to the garment.
description_cat: Mesura des del punt més alt de la caputxa fins a la costura inferior dunió.

name: POM-094
description_en: Measure the depth of one pleat from the fold line to the stitch line.
description_cat: Mesura la profunditat dun plec des de la línia de plec fins a la costura.

name: POM-093
description_en: Measure from the top of the vent opening to the bottom hem along the vent seam.
description_cat: Mesura des de la part superior de lobertura de la partió fins al baix.

name: POM-092
description_en: Measure the width of the placket from the fold or seam to the edge.
description_cat: Mesura lamplada de la botillera des del plec o costura fins a la vora.

name: POM-091
description_en: Measure the distance between the centers of two consecutive buttons.
description_cat: Mesura la distància entre els centres de dos botons consecutius.

name: POM-090
description_en: Measure from the top stop to the bottom stop of the zipper, lying flat and closed.
description_cat: Mesura des del top stop fins al bottom stop de la cremallera, tancada i plana.

name: POM-089
description_en: Measure the circumference of the leg opening of a swimsuit, garment laid flat.
description_cat: Mesura la circumferència de lobertura de cama dun bany.

name: POM-088
description_en: Measure the width of the crotch gusset at its narrowest point.
description_cat: Mesura lamplada de l'entrecuix al punt més estret.

name: POM-087
description_en: Measure the width of the strap at its midpoint, garment laid flat.
description_cat: Mesura lamplada del tirant al seu punt central.

name: POM-086
description_en: Measure the maximum vertical height of one cup, from the bottom seam to the top edge.
description_cat: Mesura lalçada màxima vertical duna copa.

name: POM-085
description_en: Measure the maximum horizontal width of one cup, garment laid flat and relaxed.
description_cat: Mesura lamplada màxima horitzontal duna copa, peça plana i relaxada.

name: POM-082
description_en: Measure from HPS to the bottom of the rib hem, garment fully relaxed.
description_cat: Mesura des de HPS fins al baix del doblet de punt, peça completament relaxada.

name: POM-081
description_en: Measure straight across the chest stretched to its fullest extent, 1 inch below the armhole.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal del pit estirat al màxim còmode, 1 cm sota sisa.

name: POM-080
description_en: Measure straight across the chest 1 inch below the armhole, garment fully relaxed.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal del pit, 1 cm sota sisa, peça completament relaxada.

name: POM-072
description_en: Measure the height of the rib hem band at the bottom of the garment, relaxed.
description_cat: Mesura alçada de la banda de punt del baix, relaxada.

name: POM-071
description_en: Measure the width of the hem fold or hem allowance at the bottom of the garment.
description_cat: Mesura lamplada de la tombada o sobrant de costura del baix.

name: POM-070
description_en: Measure straight across the bottom of the garment from side seam to side seam.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal del baix de la peça de costura lateral a costura lateral.

name: POM-062
description_en: Measure straight across the bottom hem of the skirt or dress from edge to edge.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal del baix de la faldilla o vestit de vora a vora.

name: POM-061
description_en: Measure from HPS straight down to the bottom hem along the center front.
description_cat: Mesura des de HPS fins al baix del vestit, centre davanter.

name: POM-060
description_en: Measure from the top edge of the waistband straight down to the bottom hem along the center front.
description_cat: Mesura des de la vora superior del cinturó fins al baix, centre davanter.

name: POM-057
description_en: Front rise plus back rise combined.

name: POM-056
description_en: Measure vertically from the crotch seam intersection up along the center back to the top of the waistband.
description_cat: Mesura vertical des de la intersecció entrecuix fins a la part superior del cinturó, centre posterior.

name: POM-055
description_en: Measure vertically from the crotch seam intersection up along the center front to the top of the waistband.
description_cat: Mesura vertical des de la intersecció entrecuix fins a la part superior del cinturó, centre davanter.

name: POM-052
description_en: Measure the height of the waistband from the top edge to the seam joining it to the body.
description_cat: Mesura alçada del cinturó des de la vora superior fins a la costura dunió.

name: POM-051
description_en: Measure straight across the waistband stretched to its fullest extent.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal del cinturó estès al màxim.

name: POM-050
description_en: Measure straight across the top edge of the waistband from side edge to side edge, relaxed.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal de la part superior del cinturó, de vora a vora, relaxat.

name: POM-045
description_en: Measure from the top of the waistband to the leg opening along the outside seam.
description_cat: Mesura des de la part superior del cinturó fins a la boca de cama per la costura exterior.

name: POM-044
description_en: Measure from the crotch seam intersection straight down to the leg opening along the inside seam.
description_cat: Mesura des de la intersecció de la costura entrecuix fins a la boca de cama.

name: POM-043
description_en: Measure straight across the leg opening from seam to seam at the bottom of the leg.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal de la boca de cama de costura a costura al punt baix.

name: POM-042
description_en: Measure straight across the leg at the knee level, from seam to seam.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal a lalçada del genoll, de costura a costura.

name: POM-041
description_en: Measure straight across the thigh, 1 inch below the crotch seam, from seam to seam.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal de la cuixa, 1 polzada sota la costura entrecuix.

name: POM-040
description_en: Measure straight across at a specified distance below the waistband top, from side seam to side seam.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal a distància especificada sota el cinturó, de costura a costura.

name: POM-036
description_en: Measure the full circumference of the neckband or neckline seam, garment relaxed.
description_cat: Mesura la circumferència completa del coll, peça relaxada.

name: POM-035
description_en: Measure the height of the collar at center front.
description_cat: Mesura alçada del coll al centre davanter.

name: POM-034
description_en: Measure the height of the collar stand at center back.
description_cat: Mesura alçada del peu de coll al centre posterior.

name: POM-033
description_en: Measure the full length of the collar, stretched flat, from one end to the other.
description_cat: Mesura la longitud total del coll estès pla.

name: POM-032
description_en: Measure vertically from the HPS level down to the lowest point of the back neckline.
description_cat: Mesura vertical des del nivell HPS fins al punt més baix de la neckline posterior.

name: POM-031
description_en: Measure vertically from the HPS level down to the lowest point of the front neckline.
description_cat: Mesura vertical des del nivell HPS fins al punt més baix de la neckline davantera.

name: POM-030
description_en: Measure straight across the neckline from seam to seam at the HPS level.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal de l'escot de costura a costura a l'alçada del HPS.

name: POM-028
description_en: Measure the height of the rib cuff, relaxed, from the seam joining the sleeve to the rib edge.
description_cat: Mesura alçada del puny de punt relaxat.

name: POM-027
description_en: Measure the height of the cuff from the fold or seam at the top to the sleeve opening.
description_cat: Mesura alçada del puny des del plec o costura superior fins a la boca de màniga.

name: POM-026
description_en: Measure straight across the sleeve opening stretched to its fullest extent.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal de la boca de màniga estirada al màxim.

name: POM-025
name_cat: Ample de boca de màniga / Puny
description_en: Measure straight across the sleeve opening or cuff from seam to seam, relaxed.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal de la boca de màniga o puny, de costura a costura. Relaxada.

name: POM-024
description_en: Measure straight across the sleeve at the midpoint of the sleeve length.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal al punt mig de la longitud de màniga.

name: POM-023
description_en: Measure straight across the sleeve from seam to seam, 1 inch below the armhole.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal de costura a costura, 1 polzada sota la sisa.

name: POM-022
name_cat: Longitud de màniga des de CB
description_en: Measure from center back neck across the shoulder seam to the sleeve opening.
description_cat: Mesura des del centre de coll posterior, per la costura espatlla, fins a la boca de màniga.

name: POM-021
name_cat: Longitud de màniga des de soba
description_en: Measure from the underarm seam intersection to the sleeve opening along the underside.
description_cat: Mesura des del punt soba fins a la boca de màniga, per la part inferior.

name: POM-020
description_en: Measure from the shoulder seam to the bottom of the sleeve opening, along the top of the sleeve.
description_cat: Mesura des de la costura espatlla fins al baix de la boca de màniga.

name: POM-014
description_en: Measure vertically from HPS to the shoulder seam at the armhole edge.
description_cat: Mesura vertical des de HPS fins a la costura espatlla en el punt de la sisa.

name: POM-013
description_en: Measure along the curve of the entire armhole seam from top to bottom and back to top.
description_cat: Mesura seguint el contorn de tota la costura de la sisa.

name: POM-012
description_en: Measure straight from the shoulder seam to the bottom of the armhole.
description_cat: Mesura recta des de la costura espatlla fins al punt baix de la sisa.

name: POM-011
description_en: Measure straight down the side seam from the bottom of the armhole to the bottom hem.
description_cat: Mesura vertical per la costura lateral des del punt baix de la sisa fins al baix.

name: POM-010
description_en: Measure from the center back neck seam straight down to the bottom hem.
description_cat: Mesura vertical des de la costura del coll al centre posterior fins al baix.

name: POM-009
name_cat: Longitud cos des de HPS davanter
description_en: Measure from HPS straight down the center front to the bottom hem, garment laid flat.
description_cat: Mesura vertical des de HPS fins al baix de la peça, centre davanter. Peça plana.

name: POM-008
description_en: Measure straight across the back from armhole edge to armhole edge, at a specified distance below HPS.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal de l'esquena de vora de sisa a vora de sisa.

name: POM-007
description_en: Measure straight across the front from armhole edge to armhole edge, at a specified distance below HPS.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal del davanter de vora de sisa a vora de sisa.

name: POM-006
description_en: Measure straight across the upper back from armhole edge to armhole edge, 4 inches below HPS.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal de l'esquena de vora de sisa a vora de sisa, 4 polzades sota HPS.

name: POM-005
description_en: Measure straight across from shoulder seam to shoulder seam, across the top of the back.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal de costura d'espatlla a costura d'espatlla. Peça plana.

name: POM-004
description_en: Measure straight across at the fullest part of the hip, at a specified distance from HPS.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal al punt més ample del maluc. Peça plana.

name: POM-003
description_en: Measure straight across the narrowest part of the torso, at a specified distance from HPS, garment laid flat.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal al punt més estret del tors. Peça plana.

name: POM-002
description_en: Full circumference of the chest, 1 inch below the armhole. Used for knit specs.
description_cat: Circumferència completa de pit, 1 cm sota sisa.

name: POM-001
description_en: Measure straight across the chest from side seam to side seam, 1 inch below the armhole, garment laid flat.
description_cat: Mesura horitzontal de costura lateral a costura lateral, 1 cm per sota de la sisa. Peça plana.
